problem: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost?
mechanism: Electrospun nanofiber scaffold for tissue engineering
hypothesis: The key to How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost? is Electrospun nanofiber scaffold for tissue engineering — specifically Electrospun nanofiber scaffold — which would help 3,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 32 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
